name: Certara, Inc.
description: Certara, Inc. is a global leader in biosimulation, providing software and technology-enabled services to accelerate medicines to patients. The company's proprietary biosimulation software and technology-enabled services are used by biopharmaceutical companies to model and predict how drugs behave in the human body, helping to optimize drug development, clinical trial design, and regulatory approval processes. Certara's solutions are designed to reduce the time, cost, and risk associated with bringing new therapies to market.
